name: Popcorn Balls (Anderson)
recipeInstructions:
From "The New Doubleday Cookbook" by Jean Anderson.
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, and vinegar in a heavy saucepan.
2. Insert candy thermometer and heat over moderately high heat until sugar dissolves.
3. Cook, uncovered, without stirring to 260°F or until a drop of syrup forms a hard ball in cold water.
4. Remove from the heat and stir in butter and vanilla.
5. Pour mixture over popcorn in a large bowl and stir quickly to coat all pieces.
6. Shape into balls using buttered hands.
7. Cool on wax paper or plastic food wrap.
Serves 8.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 281.7 calories; 4.7 grams total fat; (2.8 grams saturated fat); 1.0 gram protein; 5.8 grams carbohydrates; 12.4 milligrams cholesterol; 106.1 milligrams sodium.
